What We Do

Bookkeeping & Tax, Done Right

Six core services that keep your books accurate, your taxes filed on time, and your business running with real numbers — not guesses.

Monthly Bookkeeping

Categorized transactions, monthly P&L and balance sheet, owner-pay tracking, and a clean QuickBooks file. Delivered by the 5th, every month.

Bank & Credit Reconciliation

Every checking, savings, and credit card account matched to the penny — no orphan transactions, no surprises.

Annual Tax Prep (1040 / Sch C)

Full personal and Schedule C return prep, deduction review, and e-filing. Audit-defensible workpapers included.

1099 Filing

Contractor tracking, W-9 collection, and full 1099-NEC e-filing with the IRS and states by January 31st.

Catch-Up Bookkeeping

Months or years behind? We rebuild your books from bank statements and get you caught up before the next deadline.

QuickBooks Setup & Cleanup

Fresh QBO setup, chart-of-accounts cleanup, and historical fixes. We turn a messy file into a tax-ready one.

Track Record

Numbers That Add Up

Real results from real small business clients. No fluff.

About

Accurate.
On Time. Friendly.

Tidewater Books & Tax was founded to give small business owners a single team for both bookkeeping and tax — so you stop juggling a bookkeeper, a tax preparer, and a panicked April email chain.

We work with Etsy sellers, dental offices, food trucks, contractors, and online service businesses. Books are closed monthly, not scrambled in March, which means tax season is just another Tuesday.

QuickBooks ProAdvisorXero CertifiedEnrolled AgentBench-Ready

Industries we specialize in

How It Works

From Mess to Tax-Ready

Three steps. Predictable timeline. No April scramble.

1

Free Discovery Call

We look at your accounts, current books, and tax history. You get a flat-fee quote and a clear scope before anything starts.

2

Onboard & Catch Up

We connect to QuickBooks or Xero, clean up the historical mess, and get every bank and card account fully reconciled.

3

Monthly Close + Annual Tax

Books closed by the 5th each month. April rolls around and your return is already drafted, reviewed, and ready to e-file.

Client Reviews

What Clients Say

“
My Etsy shop went from a shoebox of receipts to clean monthly P&Ls in 30 days. Tax time used to wreck me — now it’s an email and a signature.
Maya R.
Etsy Shop Owner
“
Running a dental office means I don’t have time to chase QuickBooks errors. They handle payroll reconciliation, 1099s, and annual tax — flawlessly.
Karen L.
Dental Office Manager
“
My food truck books were two years behind. They caught me up, filed back taxes, and now I get clean numbers every month. Game changer.
Diego M.
Food Truck Owner

Stop Dreading
Tax Season.

Free 30-minute consultation. We’ll review your books, your tax history, and give you a flat monthly quote.
